name: io.github.tchen6500/bazi-fortune-hub
title: BaZi Fortune Hub
description: BaZi (八字) fortune-reading + 玄学社区 MCP gateway. 12 tools over MCP JSON-RPC 2024-11-05 or universal REST. Sequential t1→t2→t3→t4 chain for a full BaZi reading. Includes forum (5 tools) and meta (3 tools) for live discovery, credits, and usage audit. Entertainment purposes only. NOTE: Endpoint enforces x-api-key auth on all methods (initialize, tools/list, tools/call) — clients must supply FORTUNE_HUB_API_KEY before tools become visible.
